TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Reptilian Kingdoms Faction.

Translations.Comment: 爬行 (reptilian) + 帝国 (empire). Emphasizes ancient, sprawling civilization.
蜥蜴 (lizard/saurian) + 战士 (warrior). Core unit of the faction.
鳄 (crocodile) + 力士 (strong warrior/bruiser). Portmanteau captures crocodile-like strength.
蝾螈 (newt) + 勇士 (brave/warrior). Emphasizes lesser but spirited troops.
蜥蜴 (saurian) + 枪兵 (spearmen). Standard infantry with polearm weapons.
迅猛 (swift/rapid) + 龙 (dragon/raptor) + 骑手 (riders). Emphasizes speed and striking power.
翼龙 (pterodactyl - literal: winged dragon) + 骑手 (riders). Air cavalry unit.
蝾螈 (newt) + 轻 (light) + 骑兵 (cavalry/troops). Fast, harassing skirmishers.
火 (fire) + 蜥蜴 (lizard). Straightforward compound for fire-breathing beast.
三 (three) + 角 (horn) + 龙 (dragon). Standard Chinese term for triceratops.
丛林 (jungle) + 虫群 (swarm/horde). Captures mass of small creatures.
恐怖 (dread/terror) + 之 (possessive) + 颌 (maw/jaw). Evokes terror and predatory threat.
暴 (violent/tyrant) + 龙 (dragon). Standard Chinese term for tyrannosaurus rex.
蝾螈 (newt) + 祭司 (priest/shaman). Spiritual leader of lesser reptilian forces.
蜥蜴 (saurian) + 军阀 (warlord). Emphasizes military power and authority.
远古 (ancient) + 蟾蜍 (toad). Mystical, elder amphibian figure; distinct from reptilian units.
